rationale: The cited paper appears in the literature review as a single background reference supporting a general claim that systematic reacquisition processes are associated with organizational strength. In the citing article, it is listed alongside other prior win-back/CRM studies and is not used to build the model, specify hypotheses, define constructs, or interpret core empirical results. The main methodological and theoretical development of the paper (the mixture cure-competing risks framework for repeat churn) does not depend on this specific source.
